Custom Menu Banners for Restaurant & Food Service Display

Durable Vinyl Menu Banners with Custom Printing & Fast Ordering

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Upload a Print Ready File Let us design your product Choose your size and quantity Upload your artwork files Add special design instructions PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Menu Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Restaurant Use

Make the most of your restaurant marketing with eye-catching vinyl menu banners. From storefront displays and drive-thru installations to special promotions and seasonal menus, we can help you improve your visibility and attract more customers with professionally printed custom menu banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a menu banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years.

We offer a wide selection of custom menu banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it.

Key Features:

  • Durable 13oz vinyl construction for indoor and outdoor use
  • Full-color printing with vibrant, fade-resistant inks
  • Hemmed edges and grommets for secure installation
  • Custom sizes from 1'x1' to 8'x50'
  • Professional design assistance available
  • Made and printed in the USA
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Menu Banner Materials for Restaurant Display Applications

Your menu banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Premium 13oz Vinyl Material:

  • Weather-resistant for outdoor menu displays
  • Tear-resistant construction for high-traffic areas
  • Smooth surface for crisp text and image reproduction
  • UV-resistant inks prevent fading in sunlight
  • Food-safe materials suitable for restaurant environments

Material Specifications:

  • Weight: 13 ounces per square yard
  • Thickness: 13 mil
  • Temperature range: -40°F to 180°F
  • Expected outdoor lifespan: 3-5 years

Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Menu Banner Finishing Options for Indoor & Outdoor Installation

Professional finishing options ensure your menu banner installs securely and maintains its appearance in restaurant environments.

Standard Finishing Includes:

  • Hemmed edges on all four sides for durability
  • Nickel grommets every 2 feet along all edges
  • Reinforced corners to prevent tearing
  • Heat-welded seams for weather resistance

Installation Hardware Options:

  • Bungee cords for flexible mounting
  • Banner rope for permanent installations
  • Pole pockets for banner pole mounting
  • Velcro strips for removable displays

Custom Finishing Available:

  • Wind slits for high-wind locations
  • Custom grommet spacing
  • Reinforced mounting areas
  • Special shapes and die-cuts
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Menu Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We understand that restaurant promotions often have tight deadlines. Choose from multiple production speeds to meet your timing needs.

Production Options:

  • Same Day: Available for orders placed before 10 AM CST (rush fees apply)
  • 1 Business Day: Standard rush production
  • 2 Business Days: Most popular option - balances speed and cost
  • 4 Business Days: Standard production time
  • 6 Business Days: Economy pricing for advance planning

Production Process:

  1. Design review and approval (same business day)
  2. High-resolution printing on premium vinyl
  3. Professional finishing with hems and grommets
  4. Quality inspection and packaging
  5. Shipment with tracking information

Production times begin after design approval. All orders placed before 12 PM CST are processed the same business day.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Menu Banner Payment & Ordering Options

We make it easy for restaurants and food service businesses to order custom menu banners with flexible payment options.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • All major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal and PayPal Credit
  • Business checking accounts (ACH)
  • Net payment terms for qualified businesses
  • Purchase orders accepted

Business Account Benefits:

  • Volume discounts for multiple banners
  • Saved designs for repeat orders
  • Order history and reorder functionality
  • Dedicated account representative
  • Custom billing arrangements

Secure Ordering:

  • SSL-encrypted checkout process
  • PCI-compliant payment processing
  • Instant order confirmation
  • Real-time production tracking
PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Menu Banner Delivery

Fast, reliable shipping ensures your menu banners arrive when you need them for your restaurant promotions and displays.

Shipping Methods:

  • Standard Ground: 3-7 business days (most economical)
  • Expedited Ground: 2-3 business days
  • 2-Day Air: Guaranteed 2 business day delivery
  • Next Day Air: Overnight delivery available
  • Local Pickup: Available at our Minnesota facility

Important Shipping Notice:

Due to shipping regulations, vinyl banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for standard shipping. Contact us for custom freight quotes if you prefer your large menu banners rolled instead of folded.

Packaging & Protection:

  • Protective poly mailers for standard sizes
  • Reinforced tubes for larger banners
  • Moisture-resistant packaging
  • Tracking information provided

Delivery Confirmation:

  • Email notifications at each shipping stage
  • Real-time tracking updates
  • Delivery confirmation with signature option
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Restaurant & Food Service Uses for Menu Banners

Custom menu banners are versatile marketing tools that help restaurants attract customers and promote their offerings in various locations and situations.

Popular Restaurant Applications:

  • Drive-thru menu displays and promotions
  • Storefront window advertising
  • Outdoor patio and sidewalk displays
  • Food truck and mobile vendor signage
  • Special event and catering promotion
  • Seasonal menu announcements

Indoor Display Options:

  • Lobby and entrance area promotions
  • Behind-counter menu displays
  • Daily specials and featured items
  • Happy hour and drink promotions
  • Event space and private dining signage

Outdoor Installation Uses:

  • Building facade menu displays
  • Fence and construction barrier advertising
  • Farmers market and festival booths
  • Parking lot and street-facing promotions
  • Grand opening and new location announcements

Effective for Various Food Service Types:

  • Quick service and fast food restaurants
  • Full-service dining establishments
  • Coffee shops and cafes
  • Pizza and delivery restaurants
  • Bars and entertainment venues
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Menu Banner Artwork Requirements for High-Quality Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures your menu banner prints with crisp text, vibrant colors, and professional appearance that attracts customers.

Recommended File Formats:

  • PDF (preferred for text-heavy menus)
  • AI (Adobe Illustrator vector files)
  • EPS (vector format with fonts outlined)
  • PSD (Photoshop files with layers)
  • High-resolution JPG or PNG (300 DPI minimum)

Design Specifications:

  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum for banner printing
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: 2 inches on all sides for finishing
  • Safe Zone: Keep text 3 inches from all edges
  • Text Size: Minimum 1 inch tall for outdoor readability

Menu Design Best Practices:

  • Use high contrast colors for easy reading
  • Choose bold, readable fonts for menu items
  • Include appetizing food photography
  • Organize content with clear sections
  • Add restaurant contact information

Professional Design Services:

  • Custom menu layout and design
  • Logo placement and branding
  • Color matching to brand guidelines
  • Typography selection and sizing
  • Image editing and enhancement

Don't have print-ready artwork? Our in-house design team can create a custom menu banner design that represents your restaurant professionally and attracts customers.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Menu Banners Today

Ready to attract more customers with professional menu banners? Our easy online ordering process gets your restaurant signage into production quickly.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Menu Banners:

  • Over 20 years of banner printing experience
  • Fast production times with same-day options available

  • Competitive pricing with volume discounts
  • Excellent customer service and support

Getting Started is Easy:

  1. Choose your banner size and quantity above
  2. Upload your menu design or request custom design

  4. Review and approve your proof
  5. Receive your professional menu banners

Questions About Your Menu Banner Order?

Our experienced customer service team is here to help. Call us at (320) 391-5300 Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 4 PM CST, or contact us online anytime.

Need something custom? Request a custom quote for special sizes, unique materials, or large quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Menu Banner Questions & Installation Support

What size menu banner works best for restaurants?

Popular sizes include 3'x6' for storefront displays, 2'x4' for drive-thru menus, and 4'x8' for building-mounted installations. The optimal size depends on viewing distance and available space.

How long do vinyl menu banners last outdoors?

Our 13oz vinyl menu banners typically last 3-5 years outdoors with proper installation and care. Indoor banners can last much longer when protected from direct sunlight and weather.

Can I update my menu banner design for seasonal specials?

Yes, we save all customer designs for easy reordering. You can modify text, images, and pricing for new seasonal menus while keeping the same layout and branding.

What's the best way to install a menu banner outdoors?

Use the provided grommets with bungee cords or banner rope. Ensure adequate support points every 2-3 feet to prevent wind damage. Consider wind slits for high-wind locations.

Do you offer design services for menu banners?

Yes, our in-house graphic designers can create custom menu layouts, incorporate your branding, and optimize the design for maximum readability and customer appeal.

Can menu banners be washed or cleaned?

Yes, vinyl menu banners can be cleaned with mild soap and water. Avoid harsh chemicals or pressure washing that might damage the printed surface or finishing.

What file format should I use for menu artwork?

PDF files work best for menu designs with text and pricing. Ensure your file is at least 150 DPI resolution and includes a 2-inch bleed area around all edges.

Do you offer rush production for menu banners?

Yes, we offer same-day and next-day production options for urgent restaurant promotions. Contact us before 10 AM CST for same-day production availability.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
